scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 4 of 5 legacy streams, including company_profile/stock_recommendations now expressed via streams.json's fan_out.ids_from.config_key dialect (S4 engine mini-wave item 2); company_news remains blocked (ENGINE_GAP: its from/to date window's upper bound is legacy's time.Now() at read time, a genuinely dynamic runtime value with no engine 'current date' pseudo-reference to derive it from — fan_out alone does not close this gap; see docs.md Known limits); the full Finnhub surface (real-time quotes, forex, crypto, financials) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: legacy's from/to date window requires 'to' = time.Now().UTC() at read time; the declarative dialect has no 'current date'/now pseudo-reference to derive a dynamic upper bound from (fan_out closes the symbol-partitioning half of this stream's gap but not this half); see docs.md Known limits and this bundle's reported blocker
/quote is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
